raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Settle the week","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately, Test?","description":"Safe opener that lets Test set context before any issue is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision drag","name":"Where are you waiting on decisions that are slowing you down?","description":"Surfaces hidden dependency points without repeating the generic blocker scan.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stakeholder landings","name":"How have your updates been landing with the people who rely on them?","description":"Checks whether communication is actually moving decisions forward.","purpose":"competency","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trade-offs now","name":"What are you choosing not to do right now?","description":"Forces the real priority trade-off behind the current workload.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quiet drag","name":"What part of your work feels like it's costing more than it should?","description":"Finds the area where effort and payoff are out of balance.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support gap","name":"What would make the next two weeks easier from my side?","description":"Gets specific manager support requests without turning into a generic check-in.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recovery check","name":"Since we last spoke, where has your energy been going up or down?","description":"Anchors the wellbeing read to the bi-weekly cadence and looks for sustainability.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership edge","name":"Where are you taking the lead more than you were a month ago?","description":"Looks for initiative and ownership beyond the baseline work.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Scope pressure","name":"What feels most crowded in your plate right now?","description":"Surfaces overload and what is compressing the week.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"Given what we've covered, what do you want to focus on first over the next two weeks?","description":"Closes the check-in by turning the discussion into a clear next focus.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
